text.title: Google Search Ads Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: load-keyword-research
step.action: Group keywords by intent into 10-20 / group.

step.name: draft-rsa-set
step.action: ≥3 RSAs per ad group with diversified headlines.

step.name: configure-match-mix
step.action: Broad (with smart bidding) + phrase + exact for the core list.

step.name: qs-monitor-and-remediate
step.action: Flag keywords with QS<7 within 7 days for ad copy refresh or ad-group split.
